data.name: Futa Zone: Lewd Control 🍒
data.detailed_description:
Futa Zone: Lewd Control 是一款 2D 檢查模擬器與視覺小說，背景設定於一座專為全球最大膽的賓客打造的豪華私人度假村。
你將扮演一名駐守在這座秘密天堂入口的邊境官員，負責執行度假村擁有者每日下達的入場規則。



每天都會出現新的條件：也許你必須拒絕擁有特定偏好的賓客，或那些隱藏著不尋常秘密的人。你的職責是檢查、審問並做出決定 —— 但每一次失誤都會被記錄，而誘惑從未遠離。

🕹️ 遊戲玩法概覽


每日指令
每天開始時，你會收到來自度假村管理層的訊息，列出當日的具體入場規則。這些規則決定了誰能進入、誰不能進入。

賓客檢查
檢查護照、表格與個人資料。比對資訊以找出不一致之處 —— 不相符的姓名、年齡或申報興趣可能意味著欺騙。



對話與反應
透過對話系統與賓客互動。提出問題、觀察反應，並找出其中的矛盾。

X 光掃描
解鎖度假村的標誌性工具 —— X 光掃描器。將游標移至特定區域，即可揭露隱藏細節，用來證實或推翻賓客的說法。



體溫檢測
測量賓客的體溫，確保他們符合每日的入場標準。過高的數值可能比表面上看起來更具暗示性。

通過或拒絕
在檢查表上勾選相關選項，並使用官方印章 —— 「批准」或「拒絕」。
每一個決定都會影響你的評分。每天三次失誤，你就必須重新開始值班。

進度與選擇
體驗 7 個遊戲日，接待 29 位獨特賓客，並遇見 3 位關鍵角色，他們的故事遠遠超出檢查櫃檯。

🌴 遊戲特色

💄 沉浸式 2D 視覺風格，靈感來自光澤感十足的 2000 年代美學與風格化藝術。
🛏️ 7 天分支劇情，難度逐步提升並引入新機制。
🔥 X 光與熱成像掃描系統，帶來更深層的遊戲互動。
😈 29 位風格各異的角色，擁有獨特外觀、性格與秘密。
😏 3 段劇情導向的邂逅，包含延伸對話與多種結果。
💦 模擬玩法與敘事深度的結合，融合幽默、懸疑與成人張力。
🎭 根據你的準確度與選擇，解鎖多種結局。

data.short_description: 在一座秘密 VIP 度假村中擔任邊境官員，慾望才是真正的通行證。檢查賓客，揭露他們的癖好，並決定誰能進入 —— 服從者、禁忌者，或最令你心動的人。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

data.name: Futa Zone: Lewd Control 🍒
data.detailed_description:
Futa Zone: Lewd Control is a 2D inspection simulator and visual novel set in a luxurious private resort for the world’s most daring guests.
You play as a border officer stationed at the entrance to this secret paradise, responsible for enforcing the daily rules sent by the resort’s owners.



Each day brings new conditions: maybe you must deny guests with certain preferences, or those hiding something unusual. Your duty is to inspect, question, and decide — but every mistake counts, and temptation is never far away.

🕹️ Gameplay Overview


Daily Directives
Begin each day with a message from the resort’s management listing specific entry rules. These determine who can and cannot be admitted that day.

Guest Inspection
Examine passports, forms, and personal data. Compare information for inconsistencies — mismatched names, ages, or declared interests may signal deception.


Dialogues & Reactions
Interact with guests using a dialogue system. Ask questions, observe their responses, and catch contradictions.

X-Ray Scanning
Unlock the resort’s signature tool — the X-Ray scanner. By hovering over specific areas, reveal hidden details that may confirm or disprove a guest’s statements.


Temperature Check
Measure guests’ body temperature to ensure they meet the daily entry criteria. A high reading might be more revealing than it seems.

Pass or Deny
Mark relevant checkboxes on your inspection sheet and use official stamps — “Approve” or “Reject.”
Each decision affects your score. Three mistakes per day, and you’ll have to restart your shift.

Progress & Choices
Work through 7 in-game days, meet 29 unique guests, and encounter 3 key characters whose stories go far beyond the inspection desk.

🌴 Features

💄 Immersive 2D visual style inspired by glossy 2000s aesthetics and stylized art.
🛏️ 7 days of branching scenarios with increasing difficulty and new mechanics.
🔥 X-Ray and thermal scanning systems for deeper gameplay interaction.
😈 29 distinct characters, each with unique visuals, personalities, and secrets.
😏 3 story-driven encounters with extended dialogues and multiple outcomes.
💦 A mix of simulation mechanics and narrative depth, blending humor, intrigue, and adult tension.
🎭 Multiple endings depending on your accuracy and choices.

data.short_description: Work as a border officer at a secret VIP resort where lust is the real passport. Inspect guests, expose their kinks, and decide who gets in — the obedient, the forbidden, or the ones who turn you on the most.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
